generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I've been following the debate on expanding domestic security powers. While some worry about overreach, we can't ignore the real threats we face. The recent attacks in Europe show how vulnerable we are when agencies can't act decisively. Our intelligence community needs the tools to protect us without unnecessary bureaucracy. It's not about giving up liberties - it's about giving our defenders the flexibility they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurityMatters #BalancedApproach
